description: The Islamic Revolutionary Guard Corps (IRGC), known domestically as Sepah or Pasdaran, is a multi-service elite military force established by [Khomeini](/people/ruhollah-khomeini) in May 1979. It consists of five branches: Ground Forces, Aerospace Force, Navy, [Quds Force](/orgs/irgc-quds-force), and [Basij](/orgs/basij). Its commander-in-chief reports directly to the Supreme Leader. Beyond its military role, the IRGC controls a vast economic empire including Khatam al-Anbiya Construction, multiple banks, and extensive holdings in energy, telecommunications, and construction. Estimated at 125,000 personnel.
editorial_notes: Designated Foreign Terrorist Organization by US in 2019. Sanctioned by EU, UK, Canada. Controls Khatam al-Anbiya Construction conglomerate.
